payload.title: Production-grade AI agents for financial compliance: Lessons from Stripe
payload.fact: Stripe built a production-grade AI agent system on AWS using Amazon Bedrock that reduced review handling time by 26 percent while maintaining human oversight.
supporting_evidence: Stripe built a production-grade AI agent system on AWS using Amazon Bedrock
Reduced review handling time by 26 percent

payload.title: Optimize model training on Amazon SageMaker AI with NVIDIA Blackwell
payload.fact: Amazon Web Services optimized model training on Amazon SageMaker AI using NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs.
supporting_evidence: Optimizing model training on Amazon SageMaker AI with NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs
Blackwell’s expanded memory and new precision formats reduce constraints
